title: aws-ssm: put maps ParameterNotFound to Unavailable (should be NotFound/Backend)
description: Trigger: caller calls put on a path that does not exist AND IAM policy only allows ssm:PutParameter (not ssm:CreateParameter). AWS returns ParameterNotFound. The put error handler falls through to SecretError::Unavailable, implying retry will succeed. It won't. The get handler correctly maps is_parameter_not_found() to NotFound; put is inconsistent. Fix: map is_parameter_not_found() in put to NotFound or Backend.
